# Chandra Kanojia

Official website: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/
Canonical profile: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/profile/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chandra-kanojia/

Chandra Kanojia is an Enterprise Transformation Executive whose experience combines Fortune 100 operating leadership with global consulting across financial services and other regulated industries. His public work focuses on turning AI, technology, platform, workflow, data, governance, and operating-model investment into business value.

## Primary topics
- Enterprise transformation
- Operating models
- Financial services transformation
- Enterprise AI and governed AI
- Capacity constraints and operating leverage
- CRM and workflow modernization
- Adoption, governance, and value realization

- Home: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/
- Profile: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/profile/
- Perspectives: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/perspectives/
- Contact: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/contact/

- Voice Is the Next Frontier of User Experience: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/perspectives/voice-is-the-next-frontier-of-user-experience/
